touches.ai_summary: Inbound inquiry from Valentina Yang at LunarChannel regarding onboarding automation. She expressed interest in exploring solutions to streamline their CS team's workflows.
next_steps: Send product overview and schedule qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview and ROI calculator. Valentina responded confirming interest and availability for a discovery call next week.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with Intercom and Zendesk?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms plus API access for custom workflows

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: 16-minute discovery call with Valentina. Discussed current onboarding pain points: manual ticket routing, inconsistent follow-up timing, and lack of visibility into customer health signals. Team of 7 CS reps handling ~200 new customers/month. Currently evaluating Fireflies as well.

questions_asked.question: What's your current onboarding flow and where are the biggest bottlenecks?
questions_asked.answer: We manually triage tickets and schedule check-ins. Biggest issue is timing—we miss critical windows when customers need help most

questions_asked.question: How does your automation handle edge cases or unusual customer requests?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI flags uncertain cases for human review and learns from your team's decisions over time

next_steps: Schedule demo focused on automation workflows and Intercom integration

touches.ai_summary: 57-minute product demo with Valentina covering automation builder, workflow templates, and integration setup. She was engaged and asked detailed questions about implementation timeline and team training. Expressed concern about budget constraints and mentioned Fireflies offers a lower entry price point.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks with our onboarding team, including integration setup and workflow configuration

questions_asked.question: What level of technical expertise do our CS reps need to manage workflows?
questions_asked.answer: No coding required—drag-and-drop interface with pre-built templates for common onboarding scenarios

questions_asked.question: Beyond the CS team, are there other stakeholders we should involve in the evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: It's mainly our CS team driving this. I'll keep leadership informed as we progress

objections: Budget is tight this quarter—we're comparing options and Fireflies is significantly cheaper
next_steps: Valentina to review internally and provide feedback

touches.ai_summary: Proposal email sent with custom pricing at $3,800 ACV for 7 seats with unlimited automation tier. Valentina acknowledged receipt and mentioned she's reviewing with her team before the pricing discussion next week.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the per-seat pricing if we commit to annual?
questions_asked.answer: Let's discuss options on our pricing call—there may be room depending on contract terms

next_steps: Pricing call scheduled to discuss proposal and address questions

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute pricing call (rescheduled from earlier in week). Valentina pushed for additional discount citing budget approval challenges and competitive pressure from Fireflies. Discussed contract terms and implementation timeline. She confirmed this needs to stay within CS budget without requiring executive sign-off.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fireflies' pricing or get closer to their range?
questions_asked.answer: We've already discounted significantly to $3,800 from our standard $7,000 rate. Our automation capabilities are more comprehensive than Fireflies' transcription focus

questions_asked.question: Would it help to bring in your VP or CFO to discuss the ROI impact on customer retention?
questions_asked.answer: I'd prefer to keep this at the CS team level for now—I have budget authority for tools in this range

objections: We're really stretched on budget and need to justify this without executive involvement
next_steps: Follow up early next week on decision timeline
